message:
fix(run-as-user): drop /home/$user heuristic from agent/cli/cloud_db/lang/stack target_home resolvers; fail closed instead

Five sibling helper libraries
(scripts/lib/{agents,cli_tools,cloud_db,languages,stack}.sh) each
implement a `_*_target_home()` resolver used to plumb TARGET_HOME
through their respective `_*_run_as_user` invocations.  All five
shared the same buggy fallback: when TARGET_HOME was empty AND the
target user could not be resolved via getent, they would
optimistically guess `/home/$target_user` if the username matched
`^[a-z_][a-z0-9._-]*$`.  In practice this:

  - Created arbitrary `/home/<typoed-name>` directories during
    `chown` follow-ups, polluting the filesystem when the typoed
    name happened to match the regex.
  - Routed `sudo -i -u <typoed>` calls into a working-but-wrong
    home, which then either silently succeeded against unrelated
    user state or failed with a non-actionable error.
  - Hid genuine misconfigurations (a deleted user, a username
    drifted between hosts) behind a "looks fine" path.

Now all five resolvers return failure when both getent and the
current-user shortcut fail, leaving the caller's existing
"Invalid TARGET_HOME for '<user>': <empty>" assertion to fire.

The current-user shortcut also got hardened: `id -un` is now tried
before `whoami` because `whoami` is missing on minimal Alpine /
distroless images where `id` is always present.

tests/unit/lib/test_update.bats
  New `run-as-user helper libs reject unresolved TARGET_HOME
  before sudo` case stubs `getent` to return 2 (entry not found),
  sources each of the five libraries in turn, calls each
  `_*_run_as_user env` invocation, and asserts:
    a) The call fails with the canonical "Invalid TARGET_HOME for
       '<user>'" message.
    b) `sudo` was NEVER invoked (verified by an empty
       `$STUB_DIR/sudo.log`).
  This nails the fix to all five libs simultaneously — if any one
  resurrects the heuristic, the test fails for that lib only,
  surfacing the regression site precisely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -74,17 +74,12 @@ _agent_target_home() {
         fi
     fi
 
-    current_user="$(whoami 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || whoami 2>/dev/null || true)"
     if [[ "$current_user" == "$target_user" ]] && [[ -n "${HOME:-}" ]] && [[ "${HOME}" == /* ]] && [[ "${HOME}" != "/" ]]; then
         printf '%s\n' "${HOME%/}"
         return 0
     fi
 
-    if [[ "$target_user" =~ ^[a-z_][a-z0-9._-]*$ ]]; then
-        printf '/home/%s\n' "$target_user"
-        return 0
-    fi
-
     return 1
 }

 }

@@ -1391,6 +1391,51 @@ EOF
     [[ ! -s "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log" ]] || fail "_stack_run_as_user should not invoke sudo for invalid TARGET_USER"
 }
 
+@test "run-as-user helper libs reject unresolved TARGET_HOME before sudo" {
+    export TARGET_USER="missinguser"
+    export TARGET_HOME=""
+    export ACFS_BIN_DIR="/home/tester/.local/bin"
+
+    getent() {
+        return 2
+    }
+
+    source_lib "cli_tools"
+    spy_command "sudo"
+    run _cli_run_as_user env
+    assert_failure
+    assert_output --partial "Invalid TARGET_HOME for 'missinguser': <empty>"
+    [[ ! -s "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log" ]] || fail "_cli_run_as_user should not invoke sudo for unresolved TARGET_HOME"
+
+    source_lib "agents"
+    : > "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log"
+    run _agent_run_as_user env
+    assert_failure
+    assert_output --partial "Invalid TARGET_HOME for 'missinguser': <empty>"
+    [[ ! -s "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log" ]] || fail "_agent_run_as_user should not invoke sudo for unresolved TARGET_HOME"
+
+    source_lib "languages"
+    : > "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log"
+    run _lang_run_as_user env
+    assert_failure
+    assert_output --partial "Invalid TARGET_HOME for 'missinguser': <empty>"
+    [[ ! -s "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log" ]] || fail "_lang_run_as_user should not invoke sudo for unresolved TARGET_HOME"
+
+    source_lib "cloud_db"
+    : > "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log"
+    run _cloud_run_as_user env
+    assert_failure
+    assert_output --partial "Invalid TARGET_HOME for 'missinguser': <empty>"
+    [[ ! -s "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log" ]] || fail "_cloud_run_as_user should not invoke sudo for unresolved TARGET_HOME"
+
+    source_lib "stack"
+    : > "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log"
+    run _stack_run_as_user env
+    assert_failure
+    assert_output --partial "Invalid TARGET_HOME for 'missinguser': <empty>"
+    [[ ! -s "$STUB_DIR/sudo.log" ]] || fail "_stack_run_as_user should not invoke sudo for unresolved TARGET_HOME"
+}
+
 @test "cloud_db username validation accepts dotted target usernames" {
     source_lib "cloud_db"
